overview: ZOON is a cyberpunk-themed 3D character scene and video prompt generator. Pick heroes, vehicles, animals, and worlds, then build cinematic AI image or video prompts with full style controls.
features: Tabbed navigation: Heroes, Rides, Animals, Worlds, Scene, Veo 3
Character grid with category filter and glow/spin selection effects
World background picker with gradient previews
Scene builder with render style, lighting, pose, and expression options
Video prompt builder with camera moves, motion styles, duration, and ratio
Animated progress bar during video prompt generation
Cyberpunk UI with floating particles, grid overlay, and shimmer text
Fully responsive dark design with Orbitron font
